# Surrey Contracting Limited

> Surrey Contracting Limited is a groundworks, bulk earthworks, commercial surfacing and residential paving contractor based in Leatherhead, Surrey.

## Services
- Groundworks: site preparation, foundations, drainage, excavation and infrastructure
- Bulk Earthworks: large-scale excavation, site levelling, land remediation
- Commercial Surfacing: tarmac surfacing for car parks, roads, industrial estates and access routes
- Residential Driveways & Paving: tarmac driveways, resin-bound surfaces, block paving, patios

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://surreycontracting.co.uk/
- Services: https://surreycontracting.co.uk/services
- Sectors: https://surreycontracting.co.uk/sectors
- Projects: https://surreycontracting.co.uk/projects
- About: https://surreycontracting.co.uk/about
- Health & Safety: https://surreycontracting.co.uk/health-safety
- Contact: https://surreycontracting.co.uk/contact

## Contact
- Phone: 01932 932650
- Email: info@surreycontracting.co.uk
- Address: Upper Leewood Farm Yard, Effingham Common Road, Leatherhead, KT24 5JQ

## Areas Covered
Surrey and surrounding areas including Cobham, Leatherhead, Guildford, Esher, Woking, Reigate, Dorking, Epsom, Weybridge, Kingston, Redhill, Surbiton.

## Accreditations
CHAS, SafeContractor, SSIP, SMAS Worksafe, CITB, CSCS, NPORS, IPAF.
